text:
Difficulty consuming the 150 g of chicken breast. Fortunately I can reduce this amount by compensating with a 3rd egg (in crêpes or pancakes), or by replacing it twice a week with fish, one of those times with tuna in oil, or with more solution.
These options will help me continue phase 2. In addition, I know that the diet can be further expanded afterwards... Hence the importance of follow-up with a dietitian.”
36-year-old patient: was growing tired of certain required foods
